events.description: The user successfully initiates screen sharing, causing the UI to update from instructions to a 'Perfect!' confirmation message.
events.frame_description: A dark screen with white text instructions transitioning to a success message.

events.description: The cursor rests near the browser's screen sharing notification bar at the bottom of the screen.
Task instructions are progressively revealed to the user on the screen.
events.frame_description: Text instructions appearing line by line on a dark background.

events.description: The browser navigates from a blank page to the Figma prototype URL.
events.frame_description: The address bar updates from about:blank to the Figma site URL.

events.description: The Figma prototype 'Smart Filters' page content begins to load and become visible.
events.frame_description: The Figma prototype interface appears on the screen.

events.description: User dwells on the 'Explore' section of the Smart Filters app, likely reading the 'AI Interview' and 'Video Call' opportunity cards.
User scrolls down the list of opportunities, revealing new cards including 'Diary Study' and a different 'AI Interview' task.
events.frame_description: The list of opportunity cards shifts upwards to show more items.

events.description: User scrolls up through the list of opportunities, moving the 'Diary Study' card out of view.
events.frame_description: A list of research opportunities in a mobile app prototype.

events.description: User continues scrolling up, bringing the 'Video Call' card to the top of the visible area.
User scrolls up further, bringing the 'In Person' card into focus at the top.
User scrolls down the list, revealing the 'AI Interview' card and the 'Sessions to schedule' header.
User scrolls up slightly while the cursor is positioned over the 'In Person' card.
User scrolls down to bring the 'AI Interview' card back into full view.
User scrolls up through the opportunity list.
User scrolls down the list of study opportunities to view more options.
User continues scrolling down, bringing 'In Person' and 'Diary Study' cards into view.
User scrolls back up to the top of the 'Explore' section.
The screen transitions from the prototype view to a dark overlay containing text feedback.
events.frame_description: A dark screen appears with the text 'I noticed' visible.

events.description: User hovers over the browser tab for 'Smart Filters Mobile App', displaying a tab info tooltip.
events.interaction_target: Smart Filters Mobile App browser tab

events.description: User moves the cursor over the 'Video Call' study opportunity card.
User moves the cursor down to hover over the 'In Person' study opportunity card.
User clicked the 'Open' button
events.frame_description: The user clicks an 'Open' button on a dark interface.

events.description: User pauses to read the question on the screen regarding the appeal of the 10-minute AI interview.
events.frame_description: The screen displays a question about the AI interview on a dark background.

events.description: User switched to the 'Askable Sessions' browser tab
events.frame_description: The browser tab for 'Askable Sessions' becomes highlighted, indicating it is now the active tab.

events.description: User dwells on the screen, likely reading the question about how the display helps distinguish between opportunities.
events.frame_description: Dark screen with a question displayed; the user is stationary, likely reading.

events.description: User scrolls up the page, bringing the 'Explore' heading into view at the top of the screen.
events.frame_description: The view shifts from the 'Short tasks & surveys' section to the 'Explore' section.

events.description: The cursor hovers over the 'Either' tag within the AI Interview card, which is highlighted in blue.
events.frame_description: A close-up view of the AI Interview card showing the 'Either' tag in a highlighted state.

events.description: User hovered over the 'AI Interview' card
events.frame_description: Prototype view with the cursor hovering over the 'AI Interview' card.

events.description: User scrolls up through the session list, moving past the 'AI Interview' card to view 'In Person' and 'Diary Study' options.
events.frame_description: The session list scrolls vertically, revealing different task cards.

events.description: User pauses to read the details of the 'In Person' and 'Diary Study' session cards.
events.frame_description: The screen remains static on the 'In Person' and 'Diary Study' cards.

events.description: User scrolls back down the list to return to the top of the session feed.
events.frame_description: The list scrolls downwards, bringing the 'AI Interview' card back into view.

events.description: User stops scrolling and dwells on the 'AI Interview' and 'Video Call' cards.
events.frame_description: The screen is stationary at the top of the session list.

events.description: User scrolls down the list of sessions to view more options, revealing the 'Diary Study' card.
events.frame_description: The mobile app prototype shows a list of session types. Between frames, the view shifts upwards, bringing the 'Diary Study' card into view at the bottom.

events.description: User scrolls down through the list of research opportunities.
The AI moderator types a question into the chat interface.
User hovers over the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' browser tab, showing a page preview.
User continues scrolling through the opportunities list.
User scrolls further down the page.
The 'Filter Opportunities' modal appears on the screen.
User selects the 'Mobile Only' device filter option.
The filter modal closes and the opportunity list updates to show only mobile-only tasks.
User switches browser tabs to return to the 'Askable Sessions' page.
User scrolls down the list of opportunities to view more cards.
events.frame_description: The user scrolls down the mobile app prototype to browse through different study opportunities like 'Diary Study' and 'AI Interview'.

events.description: User pauses on the screen, likely reading the question regarding their experience with filtering options as described in the page context.
events.frame_description: A dark screen where the user remains stationary, presumably reading on-screen text while the cursor stays at the bottom right.

events.description: User scrolls up the page to reveal the 'Explore' section and 'Short tasks & surveys' header.
events.frame_description: The viewport moves towards the top of the page, bringing the 'Explore' header into view while the cursor moves from the 'Video Call' card to the 'AI Interview' card.

events.description: User switched browser tabs from 'Opportunities' to 'Askable Session'
events.frame_description: The browser tab 'Askable Session' becomes highlighted, indicating the user is switching to that tab.

events.description: User switches to the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' tab and the prototype loads.
events.frame_description: The browser transitions from the 'Askable Sessions' tab to the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' prototype, showing a loading state before the content appears.

events.description: User scrolls down the list of opportunities to view 'In Person' and 'Diary Study' tasks.
events.frame_description: The view shifts from the top of the 'Short tasks & surveys' section down to reveal more task cards.

events.description: User scrolls back up to the top of the 'Short tasks & surveys' section.
events.frame_description: The view scrolls back up, returning the 'AI Interview' card and section header to the top of the screen.

events.description: User hovers over the 'Open' button
events.frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Open' button on a dark background.

events.description: A browser tab preview or thumbnail appears in the upper right corner of the screen
events.frame_description: A small preview window showing a mobile-style interface appears.

events.description: The question text 'As you look at the options for short tasks...' appears on the screen
events.frame_description: Text is being dynamically displayed on the dark background as part of the session flow.

events.description: User clicks on the 'Askable Session' browser tab to switch views.
events.frame_description: The cursor moves from the page content area to the browser tab bar.

events.description: The browser navigates to the 'Askable Session' tab, resulting in a screen transition to a dark state.
events.frame_description: The screen turns black following the tab click, indicating a page load or transition.

events.description: User clicks on the 'Askable Session' browser tab, causing it to change to an active or highlighted state.
events.frame_description: The browser tab bar is visible at the top of the screen. Between frame 0 and frame 1, the 'Askable Session' tab changes from a white background to a light blue highlight.

events.description: User switched to the 'Askable Session' browser tab.
events.frame_description: The browser tab bar shows the 'Askable Session' tab becoming active with a blue highlight.

events.description: User clicks the 'Open' button to move on from the prototype as suggested by the on-screen text.
events.frame_description: A dark screen displays the question 'Shall we move on from this prototype?' with an 'Open' button below it.

events.description: The page transitions to a blank state following the click on the 'Open' button, indicating a navigation or loading phase.
events.frame_description: The screen turns blank, indicating a page load or transition.
